subtitle.ios: Scanning for desktop apps on your local network...
subtitle.android: Scanning for desktop apps on your local network. If no device is found, enter the IPv4 address manually.

emptyState.android: No devices found. Enter the IP address manually to continue pairing.

troubleshooting.title: Can't find a device or not sure how to connect?
troubleshooting.sameWifi: Make sure your phone and computer are connected to the same Wi-Fi or local network.
troubleshooting.desktopApp: Open www.vividrop.cn in your computer browser, download the desktop app, and keep it open.

unconnected.title: Start using Vivi Drop
unconnected.subtitle: Sync media wirelessly from phone to computer in three steps.

downloadStep.title: Install PC App
downloadStep.body: Install Vivi Drop on your computer

connectStep.title: Connect Phone
connectStep.body: Enter a pairing code or scan QR

unconnected.copyFailed: Could not copy the download address. Please try again later.
unconnected.copyHint: Open this address in your computer browser to download
unconnected.footerNote: First-time guide · Available again from Help

openLinkFailed.title: Cannot Open
openLinkFailed.body: Could not open {{label}} right now. Please try again later.

manualInput.title: Enter IP to Pair
manualInput.description: If the scan can't find your computer — especially Windows — enter the desktop app's IPv4 address directly.
manualInput.guideTitle: Where do I find the code and IP?
manualInput.guideBody: Open Vivi Drop on your computer, choose Global Settings from the sidebar, then check the 6-digit code, device IP, or QR code.
manualInput.hint: Uses sync port 39393 by default. You'll still need to enter the 6-digit pairing code in the next step.
manualInput.ipError: Please enter a valid IPv4 address, e.g. 192.168.0.1
